prompt_text:
### Demographics: 60-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 10 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs; Intermittent GI discomfort (nausea/bloating)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent)
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Cataract (status post surgery)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older sister)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Insulin Glargine 15units once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 83.4 kg; Height 156.6 cm; BMI 34.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 115/70 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.3%; 9 months ago 8.4%; 6 months ago 8.7%; 3 months ago 8.8%; current 9.4%), FPG (12 months ago 228mg/dL; 9 months ago 216mg/dL; 6 months ago 226mg/dL; 3 months ago 245mg/dL; current 201mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 84.7kg; 9 months ago 85.3kg; 6 months ago 82.1kg; 3 months ago 80.1kg; current 83.4kg), Height (12 months ago 156.6cm; 9 months ago 156.6cm; 6 months ago 156.6cm; 3 months ago 156.6cm; current 156.6cm), BMI (12 months ago 35.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 33.0kg/m²; current 34.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 115mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 71mmHg; 9 months ago 70mmHg; 6 months ago 71mmHg; 3 months ago 71mmHg; current 70mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 120U/L; 9 months ago 125U/L; 6 months ago 117U/L; 3 months ago 122U/L; current 123U/L), AST (12 months ago 52U/L; 9 months ago 59U/L; 6 months ago 49U/L; 3 months ago 50U/L; current 54U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.5mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.4mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.5mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.4mg/dL; current 1.4mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 57mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 54mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 57mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 53mL/min/1.73m²; current 53mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 245mg/g; 9 months ago 268mg/g; 6 months ago 285mg/g; 3 months ago 300mg/g; current 279mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 98mg/dL; 9 months ago 99mg/dL; 6 months ago 98mg/dL; 3 months ago 98mg/dL; current 97mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 43mg/dL; 9 months ago 46mg/dL; 6 months ago 43mg/dL; 3 months ago 43mg/dL; current 44mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 108mg/dL; 9 months ago 102mg/dL; 6 months ago 108mg/dL; 3 months ago 107mg/dL; current 114mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 13.0g/dL; 3 months ago 13.0g/dL; current 13.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
